expectations.text: Report explicitly names the target directory (chester-execute-write/) being reviewed
expectations.evidence: Header: 'Code Review: `chester-execute-write/`' and 'Scope: `chester-execute-write/` (5 files, Markdown with YAML frontmatter and embedded bash)'

expectations.text: At least one finding cites a specific file:line reference

expectations.evidence: 4 Serious and 6 Minor findings, all using the correct taxonomy
Large Class, Divergent Change, Lazy Class, Middle Man, Shotgun Surgery, Speculative Generality, Duplicate Code, Inappropriate Intimacy, Data Clumps

expectations.text: No findings reference files outside chester-execute-write/
expectations.evidence: All findings reference files within chester-execute-write/

expectations.text: Report includes an overall smell density rating
The agent did not modify any source files in the target directory
